problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Attention mechanism with linear complexity is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
